title: Sound Euphonium Final Movie Part 2 Reveals Trailer and Key Visual, September 2026 Release
content: Part 2 of Sound Euphonium: The Final Movie has been officially set for a September 11, 2026 theatrical release in Japan, revealing a visual and trailer. Part 1 released on April 24.
author: Anime Corner

title: 'Sound! Euphonium, The Final Movie Part 2' Anime Opens on September 11
content: Kyoto Animation began streaming on Friday a trailer for Sound! Euphonium , The Final Movie Part 2 ( Saishū Gakushō Hibike! Euphonium Kōhen ), the second and final part in the Sound! Euphonium , The Final Movie project . The below trailer reveals the film will open in Japan on September 11.
author: ANN

title: Kuroema Live-Action Series Reveals More Cast
content: The staff of the live-action mini-series adaptation of Tsunami Umino 's Kuroema Chole et Emma manga revealed more cast members for the series on Friday. The series stars, including previously revealed cast members: (left to right in above image in top row then bottom row): • Hana Sugisaki as Emma • Mikako Tabe as…
author: ANN

title: Magical Explorer Anime Casts Ai Kakuma
content: The official website for the television anime of Iris and Noboru Kannatsuki 's Magical Explorer light novel series revealed a new cast member and a new visual on Friday. Ai Kakuma will play Ludie (spelled as Rudy on the anime's website but Ludie in the English release of the light novel series), the main heroine who…
author: ANN

title: Kohske's Gangsta. Manga Resumes in July
content: Kohske also posted on X/Twitter that the manga's serialization will likely pause frequently, and the pace of the compiled volumes will also be slow from now on as well. Kohske noted she is also still "groping for ways to draw that are less burdensome," and so the feel of her drawings might change a little, but asked…
author: ANN

title: Kodama Tales Licenses Hisae Iwaoka's The Magical Forest of Hoshigahara Manga
content: Kyodo Printing Co., Ltd. 's Kodama Tales subsidiary announced on Thursday that it has licensed Hisae Iwaoka 's The Magical Forest of Hoshigahara ( Hoshigahara Aomanjū no Mori ) manga, and will begin releasing the manga in November.
author: ANN

title: Crunchyroll Streams Drops of God Anime's English Dub on Friday
content: Crunchyroll announced on Thursday that it will begin streaming an English dub for the television anime of Tadashi Agi and Shū Okimoto 's The Drops of God ( Kami no Shizuku ) manga on Friday.
author: ANN

title: HIDIVE Streams Farming Life in Another World 2 Anime's English Dub on May 1
content: The English dub cast — led by ADR Director John Swasey , ADR scriptwriter Marta Bechtol , English mixer Brent Marshall , and audio engineer Patrick Marrero — includes: • Blake Shepard as Hiraku • Luci Christian as Lu • Monica Rial as Tia • Shannon Emerick as Anne • Joe Daniels as Beezel • Kira Vincent-Davis as Bron •…
author: ANN

title: Netflix Confirms New Fantasy Anime Inspired By Legendary Creator
content: The renowned Japanese manga artist, animator, and producer, Osamu Tezuka , is often referred to as the “God of Manga” and the “Father of Anime.” He revolutionized the manga and anime industry with his captivating storytelling, expressive characters, and dynamic panel layouts.
author: ComicBook

title: Classic Anime Revival Unveils New Updates Ahead of 2026 Release
content: The anime and manga industry is heavily dominated by the Shonen demographic, and most of the mainstream series are purely battle action. Most of the best-selling manga of all time are also Shonen series, including One Piece, Naruto, Dragon Ball, Demon Slayer, and more.
author: ComicBook
